title: Vaseria Travelnes
description: One of the best survival and fun mods with new ores and features!
body:
### One of the best survival and fun mods with new ores and features!
![Vaseria Travelnes Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3073320edbdc16957fe03fbcfde287e85b85a1d.png)       **This mod adds**   
- New Ores 
- New mobs 
- New biomes and their tree variations 
- New structures 
- Frequent updates of the mod with innovations 
- New Music Disks 
- Food 
- Availability: Compatibility of many versions and loaders!      

_The mod contains a collection of ores and tools made from them! There are also its own biomes along with its own wood._
![Vaseria Travelnes Panorama](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0cf67dbf35cfbba4df03c6bff16eef54a03a5d9a.png)
- ###                                    Mod mechanics
  The mod itself has a lot of interesting and exciting mechanics that will catch your interest, such as: Staffs! But what gives a special charm are the structures, of which there are quite a lot in the game now.
- ###   Localization
  At the moment, the mod has English and Russian localization, but more languages will be added over time. If your language is not available, English will be used.
- ###   Features 
  We strive to add unique content. Every item added to the mod is made with soul and love. We hope that you will feel comfortable during the game!
- ###   Music records
  We add music tracks that affect the size of the mod file! Every melody used in the mod is not ours! We use it from an open music distribution source: Soundcloud: https://soundcloud.com/
- ###   About us:
We are a small studio that creates exciting content for you! Our members: **Vaserchik45** - Head of the entire studio and leads it, writes the mod and implements ideas in the mod, **tenazes** - beta tester of the game and helps with ideas, most of the structures are created by him.
